meta.title: PASTA - Portable Automotive Security Testbed with Adaptability
meta.description:
Take a look at a portable auto simulator that can be used for offensive and defensive security testing. It has ECU's, OBD-II port and the CAN protocol, just like a car.

5:20 Close up of the PASTA suitcase and displays
13:05 Video of PASTA taking control of car simulator (attack on steering)
